caption: Network — HTTP
description: HTTP/HTTPS request and response context for network_activity. Set network_application_protocol_id to HTTP (1). Use http_method_id for the HTTP method; connection lifecycle stays in activity_id. Constraint: when this profile is active (or the protocol id is HTTP), at least one of http_request or http_response MUST be populated (documented on the network_activity class description; not a separate constraints entry so the schema browser can render the class page).
name: network_http
